title: HogwartsCraft
description: A Harry Potter Mod with wands, spells, mobs and so many other things
body:
I recommend [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).
You want do help translate this [project](https://crowdin.com/project/hogwartscraft)?



## Wands 🪄


- 180 wands (10 woods x 6 designs x 3 cores)
- 42 different spells such as Avada Kedavra, Wingardium Leviosa, Stupor and many more
- Rightclick to use spell, shift and rightclick to change spell



## Floo Network 🔥


- 4 special fireplace-blocks
- Place a fireplace-blocks, type a name in the chat, step on it, type your destination and done



## Quidditch 🧹


- 4 brooms, like firebolt and Nimbus 2001
- Quaffle, Bludger and Golden Snitch



## Mobs 🐗


- over 80 different mobs
- 10 tamable mobs like crups, kneazles and owls






Credits📄
Erumpent wasn't made by me, it's from Kaupenjoe's Tutorial for 1.20.
